steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: Right after “undergone a great deal,” Trofimov describes his circumstances: hunger, illness, being shaken, and being tossed about by fate.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
"Undergone" needs to mean experienced or lived through — Trofimov lists hardships like hunger, illness, and being tossed by fate. Substitute each choice:
  • "Neglected": "I have neglected a great deal" — neglected means failed to care for or ignored. Trofimov is describing hardships he suffered, not things he ignored. ✗
  • "Enjoyed": "I have enjoyed a great deal" — enjoyed means taken pleasure in. Trofimov immediately lists suffering: hunger, illness, being shaken. Enjoyment contradicts the tone. ✗
  • "Conveyed": "I have conveyed a great deal" — conveyed means communicated or transported. Trofimov is talking about what he has experienced, not what he has communicated. ✗
  • "Endured": "I have endured a great deal" — endured means persisted through difficulty. This fits exactly: hunger, illness, and fate tossing him are hardships he has endured. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
